hero.title: Full Project Renovation: AI-Driven Agile Archaeology & Refactor Plan
hero.subtitle: End design drift and technical debt through AI archaeology, data boundary isolation, Figma design system rebuild, and the Matt Pocock Skills pipeline.

s1.heading: Background & Current Pain Points

table_rows.cause: Many anti-patterns make framework bugs hard to trace and debug.
No spec docs — response formats inferred from frontend code, with extra hacks for malformed backend responses.
Multiple error formats force frontend to add messy handling logic for each variant.
Custom transform layer scattered everywhere — original values hard to find during refactors.

s1.vision_heading: As-is Pain Points vs To-be Vision
to_be_items: 100% test coverage, refactor without feature loss
Figma design system synced with code
Clear AI Agent automation + human-AI boundaries
Data boundary isolation, clean types replace dirty data

s2.heading: Top-Level Architecture, Doc Flow & Directory Spec
s2.subheading: Complete output chain from legacy codebase to freezable Main Docs. Core navigation must be visible.
s2.diagram:
graph TD
    Code["Legacy Source"] -->|Repomix/Cursor| R1["🕵️ 1.Code Archaeologist"]
    R1 -->|As-is behavior| Flow["docs/records/domain/flow.md"]
    Payload["Legacy API Raw JSON"] --> R2["📐 2.Data Boundary Planner"]
    Flow --> R2
    Comp["Components"] --> R2
    R2 -->|To-be clean types| Schema["docs/main/contract-schemas/"]
    R2 --> Ctx["context.md Terminology"]
    Flow --> R3["✍️ 3.Behavior Test Architect"]
    Schema --> R3
    R3 -->|BDD cases| BDD["docs/records/domain/e2e-cases.feature"]
    Flow --> R4["⚖️ 4.Documentation Auditor"]
    Schema --> R4
    BDD --> R4
    R4 -->|Coverage review| Check["docs/survey-checklist.md"]
    Check -->|100% Check| Final["Phase 1 Freeze"]

doc_tree_rows.desc: Global dictionary (permanent). Uses newly defined business domain terminology.
Archaeology staging area (deleted after checklist 100%, moved to main).

s3.heading: Skills Workflow Data Production
s3.subheading: Four roles with core tasks and precise I/O. Technical specs in collapsible drawers.

roles.title: Code Archaeologist
roles.task: Map the legacy system's As-is state — distill pure business behavior from messy code, exclude dead code.

spec_sections.title: ### Edge Cases
spec_sections.desc: All business logic branches in code (excluding network/infrastructure errors).

spec_sections.title: ### Unverified Logic
spec_sections.desc: Dead code or mysterious logic written but never hit — flagged for later discussion.

roles.title: Data Boundary Planner
roles.task: Reject legacy backend bad formats. Define clean Frontend Interfaces, consolidate transforms from components and Store.
roles.input: Legacy API Raw JSON, flow.md logic, component calc fragments, Store Mutations/Selectors triggers

spec_sections.title: Target TypeScript Interface
spec_sections.desc: Clean frontend types with JSDoc @upstream_source and @old_logic_location.

spec_sections.title: Transformer Pure Functions
spec_sections.desc: For complex derived calculations (amount, distance), write fully typed executable TS transform prototypes.

roles.title: Behavior Test Architect
roles.task: Convert flow.md business logic into implementation-decoupled BDD test cases.

spec_sections.title: Business Edge Cases
spec_sections.desc: Cover all business-layer edge cases (e.g. booking code not found).

spec_sections.title: Exclude infrastructure errors
spec_sections.desc: 404/500/network handled by global Client — not in Feature files.

roles.spec_code:
Scenario: Booking code not found
  Given user enters a non-existent booking code
  When user submits query
  Then display "Booking not found" error message

roles.title: Documentation Auditor
roles.task: Strict code-coverage perspective audit of archaeology progress — ensure no file is missed.
roles.input: Legacy folder file inventory, docs/records/ produced docs

spec_sections.title: Check physical standard
spec_sections.desc: Only check when ALL .tsx/.ts files in module are surveyed AND every API has contract-schemas + BDD cases.

table_rows.scope: Booking Flow, Search & Filter (reverse-map UI hidden states), Coupon / Affiliate
table_rows.standard: Cross-page continuous actions — priority. Requires full flow.md + contract-schemas + BDD.

table_rows.scope: Nav pages, FAQ, Top Page blocks. Stored in frontend translation files (no CMS).
table_rows.standard: No schemas or BDD. List page blocks and translation key structure in docs/main/pages/.

table_rows.scope: Session validity, error attempt limits (anti-abuse), global state & URL sync (locale/currency refresh)
table_rows.standard: Strong business behavior across pages. Consolidate to docs/records/global-constraints/e2e-cases.feature.

s5.heading: Change Management & Main Docs Freeze
s5.freeze_callout: survey-checklist.md reaches 100% → Main Docs freeze point. Use this main/ version for technical and business change discussions with PM.
phase1_items: main/contract-schemas/ produces new To-be clean types.
checklist 100% → Main Docs freeze point, PM change discussion.
phase2_items: Approved changes and new requirements modify docs/main/ in Feature Branch — always To-be state.
PR must include CHANGELOG.md with Ticket links and modified files.
Code and docs merge together — code is docs, docs is code.

s6.heading: Figma Design System & Three-Layer Token Architecture
s6.intro_p1: Multi-product island maintenance: no cross-file Variable linking — adopt "Central template, local customization" pragmatic architecture.
s6.intro_p2: Central Core shadcn Template maintains Primitive definitions and component prototypes. Each project copies locally, overrides Semantic Tokens, 100% restores As-is canvas.
s6.pro_warning: ⚠️ Figma Variables require Pro plan Full seat (not Collab seat).
s6.token_rule: Three-layer Token isolation rule: canvas must ONLY use Layer 3 (Semantic) Tokens.

token_rows.access: 🔓 Only legal Token. Must name at this layer.

s6.fold_org_content: Central Workspace → Core shadcn Template (Primitive Tokens + Standard Components). Local projects → copy template + Local Semantic override + 100% As-is restore.
s6.fold_pattern_central: Central: 100% logic-visual consistency, zero customization (e.g. Japan map selector) → Copy-Paste.
s6.fold_pattern_local: Local: composite components with product-specific semantics (BookingCard, CouponSelector) → central shadcn base + local assembly.
s6.fold_align_desc: Figma component note spec: designers must manually note frontend i18n key in Description when assembling.
s6.fold_align_example: Canvas shows "Please enter your booking code" → Description: [i18n-key] booking.field.code_placeholder. Benefit: EN copy changes won't break frontend field mapping.

s7.heading: i18n Fully Automated Pipeline
s7.toolchain_note: Toolchain data cleaning: use Claude Web for docs (archaeology), Cursor for renovation. Model cleans odd formats, marks unused in status field.
s7.gemini_rule: Gemini auto-translation rule: Gemini can operate Sheets directly. Put Tone & Style Guide in Sheet instruction row. Filter unused in new projects, create SKILL.md reference.
s7.iron_rule: System Prompt global rule: if translation key missing in JSON, NEVER invent new keys. Hardcode with // TODO: i18n-missing for batch extraction.
s7.fold_json_content:
JSON format example: status, key, legacy_key, zh_TW.

Automated script compares legacy_key with original translations to check missing keys. JSON writes back to sheet (namespace column for easy lookup).
steps: AI organizes legacy translations to JSON (status: active | unused | in-progress, with namespace + legacy_key)
Script compares legacy_key with original translations, checks gaps (dynamic keys manually marked active)
Script writes to Google Spreadsheet (single sheet + namespace column; Instruction Sheet with Tone Guide)
Gemini handles initial translation (Japanese unified keigo)
New project script syncs from Sheet to code (unused filtered, in-progress shows 🚧)
SKILL.md rule: missing keys forbidden — hardcode + // TODO: i18n-missing

s8.heading: Survey, Validation & Renovation Kickoff
validation_items: Legacy and new projects in same workspace for side-by-side comparison.
Handle \n with CSS whitespace-pre-line on frontend.
Standalone Docusaurus site repo for PM confirmation.
s8.log_rule: Boundary rule: for unclear legacy logic, add logs to track if executed in production. If no data after a period, safe to delete.
s8.skills_heading: Issue Splitting & Matt Pocock Agent Skills
s8.skills_subheading: Split Issues into 5 Agent Skills. Leverage monorepo integration. Parallel Issue tasks.

skills_rows.name: Grill-with-Docs
skills_rows.desc: Clarify decision branches along design tree with archaeology docs

skills_rows.name: To-PRD
skills_rows.desc: Produce PRD from consensus with User Stories and module sketches

skills_rows.name: To-Issues
skills_rows.desc: Split PRD into vertical-slice Issues with blocking relationships

skills_rows.name: TDD
skills_rows.desc: Red-green-refactor loop — one test one implementation, no feature loss

skills_rows.name: Architecture-Refactor
skills_rows.desc: Deepen shallow modules, clarify test boundaries for stable Agent navigation

issues.title: Implement new BookingCard static component per Figma
Write booking code validation Edge Cases acceptance tests

roadmap.title: Phase 1: Archaeology & Data Boundaries
roadmap.desc: Four-role Skills produce Main Docs, achieve 100% survey-checklist
roadmap.risk: 🔥 Risk control: post-freeze technical change discussion with PM

roadmap.title: Phase 2: Figma System Rebuild
roadmap.desc: Central template copy + Local Semantic override + 100% As-is canvas restore

roadmap.title: Phase 3: Development & Refactor Launch
roadmap.desc: After Claude To-Issues, Cursor Agent + juniors execute TDD renovation pipeline
